adoptions.reason: First low-risk generated alias trial. DocumentView has stable required response fields and preserves the public frontend export name.

deferred_adoptions.reason: Generated OpenAPI marks default-backed fields such as available_modes and progress_by_mode optional, while frontend code treats them as present.
Keep the hand-authored frontend discriminated union until generated output can model the same ergonomics.
Keep hand-authored until the first alias trial has been reviewed.
